What We Do

Our Services

Every project is custom built to your needs. No two patios are the same and neither is our work.

Screen Patio Enclosures
Custom built screen enclosures that keep the bugs out and let you enjoy your outdoor space year round. Designed and built to fit your exact patio dimensions.
Cable Handrail Systems
Sleek, modern metal cable handrail systems for decks, patios, and porches. Durable, low maintenance, and built to last.
Glass Handrail Systems
Elegant glass panel handrail systems that provide safety without blocking your view. Perfect for decks and elevated patios.
About Us

Bug Stoppers Screen Patios, LLC

We are a fully insured LLC specializing in custom screen patio enclosures and handrail systems. With over 10 years of hands on experience in the trade, we know what it takes to do the job right.

Bug Stoppers Screen Patios is in its first year as a business but the experience behind it is anything but new. Every project is custom built to your specific needs — we don't do cookie cutter work.

When you call us, you speak directly to the owners. No middlemen, no runaround. Just honest work at a fair price.

10+ years of hands on experience
Fully insured LLC
Custom built to your exact specifications
Speak directly to the owners
Free estimates with no obligation
We travel up to 2 hours from Hickory
